org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core

Class KernelAdapter

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.KernelAdapter
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    KernelListener
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public class KernelAdapter
extends Object
implements KernelListener
    Listener kernel events.
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>, Nicolas GAUD <nicolas.gaud@utbm.fr>

      KernelAdapter()
      Deprecated. 
       

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void kernelAgentAdded(Kernel<?,?,?,?> kernel, AgentIdentifier... id)
      Deprecated. 
      Invoked when an agent was added inside the kernel.
      void kernelAgentRemoved(Kernel<?,?,?,?> kernel, AgentIdentifier... id)
      Deprecated. 
      Invoked when an agent was removed from the kernel.
      void kernelPaused(Kernel<?,?,?,?> kernel)
      Deprecated. 
      Invoked when the specified kernal has been paused.
      void kernelRefreshAllowed(Kernel<?,?,?,?> kernel)
      Deprecated. 
      Invoked when the kernel allows external refresh.
      void kernelRestarted(Kernel<?,?,?,?> kernel)
      Deprecated. 
      Invoked when the specified kernal has been restarted after paused.
      void kernelStarted(Kernel<?,?,?,?> kernel)
      Deprecated. 
      Invoked when the specified kernal has been started.
      void kernelStopped(Kernel<?,?,?,?> kernel)
      Deprecated. 
      Invoked when the specified kernal has been stoped.
